summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Healthmax Tracking fitness app. All backend APIs and frontend authentication flows are working correctly. Firebase authentication integration is properly implemented with correct auth middleware protection.
passed_tests: Backend API health check at /api/ returns 200
Exercise library endpoint /api/exercises works without auth
Auth middleware correctly returns 401 for protected endpoints without token
All protected endpoints (/api/workouts, /api/nutrition/search, /api/goals, /api/social/feed, /api/stats/dashboard, /api/stats/streaks) return 401 without auth
Frontend login page loads with correct UI elements
Email and password input fields present and functional
Create Account toggle link works properly
Registration mode shows name input field
Protected route redirect works - all routes (/dashboard, /workouts, /nutrition, /goals, /social, /achievements, /profile) redirect to login when accessed without auth
Invalid routes redirect to login page
Dark theme (#0f0f10) and primary color (#FF3B30) implemented correctly
